title: Add structured event logging to the executor and expose it in the frontend
prompt: Add structured JSON event logging to src/agent_runtime/executor.py (emit a log line on each step start, complete, and failure), expose those events through the existing SSE endpoint, and display the last 5 executor events in the TraceTimeline component in the frontend. Add tests for the new executor log behavior.

rubric.notes: Multi-surface: backend + frontend + observability. observability-inject skill must be triggered. High-risk: changes the executor event protocol.
